vBRIEFInfo.description: Scaffold generated by deft-directive-swarm Phase 0 from GitHub issue #526. Full acceptance criteria live in the referenced GitHub issue body.

plan.title: fix(skill): deft-directive-swarm Phase 6 -- add Greptile-service-errored recovery procedure

narratives.Overview: skills/deft-directive-swarm/SKILL.md Phase 6 Step 1 currently has no branch for the 'Greptile service errored' state (GitHub CheckRun COMPLETED/NEUTRAL + comment body 'Greptile encountered an error while reviewing this PR'). The monitor polls correctly but the subject of polling refuses to produce a result, and the swarm stalls at its max wait. This vBRIEF adds detection + retry-once + three-way escalation (wait / empty retrigger commit / override-with-documented-rationale) plus the corresponding anti-pattern and a content test. See GitHub issue #526 for the full detection rule text, escalation copy, anti-pattern prose, and acceptance criteria.

references.title: Issue #526: fix(skill): deft-directive-swarm Phase 6 -- add Greptile-service-errored recovery procedure
